programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake reveals the two key ways to correct an open club face and teaches his favorite drills for both.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick gives advice to gain more distance from the tee and help those with reduced mobility.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick shares solutions to combat the most common contact and trajectory problems suffered by less accomplished players. McCormick offers a series of drills and practice techniques that promote solid ball striking.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick seeks to end all fear that players encounter when faced with a bunker shot. McCormick offers his fundamental concepts to thrive in the sand by demonstrating techniques related to setup, clubhead entry, trajectory, and spin control.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: According to Cameron McCormick, players of every ability can suffer from the greenside yips, luckily McCormick offers a prescription to remedy the most prevalent symptom of the yips: lost confidence.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.sub-title: RX - Ball Striking and Amplifying Practice
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick shares the pillars of a successful and time efficient practice session. The 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year explains how gamifying practice can provide feedback while simulating the pressures and challenges of a competitive round.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick explains why the best players in the world spend a large portion of their practice time around the green. McCormick demonstrates four practice session games designed to emphasize fundamentals.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick provides a prescription to create more structure during putting practice sessions. McCormick shares four practice games, which are designed to hone aim and accuracy, develop better speed control and avoid three putts.

programme.title: The Skill Code
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick uses a series of skill-based games to demonstrate how becoming more adept at distance control and trajectory can create consistency in performance.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: Breaking Your Slice With Nathalie Sheehan
programme.desc: Nathalie introduces the contributing factors of a slice and identifies the two types of slicers that exist.

programme.title: Breaking Your Slice With Nathalie Sheehan
programme.desc: Nathalie introduces an error that some might be making with a grip to cause a slice; she also explains the differences between a draw setup with a driver and one with the irons.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: The feet are pivotal in the swing for balance and proper weight shift; Martin explains how the feet should sequence during the swing and offers drills for proper movement and balance.

programme.title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.sub-title: Build a Better Game: Head to Toe With Martin Hall
programme.desc: Martin shows how the knees should flex and straighten throughout the swing to maintain power and balance.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.sub-title: Birdie Challenge with Aaron Hicks & Hailey Ostrom
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal invites MLB star Aaron Hicks and golf influencer Hailey Ostrom for a high-stakes round of golf.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair joins World Series champion Cody Ross to face NFL Hall of Famer Brian Urlacher and MLB star Mark Mulder in a match of bold moves.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Jimmy Walker shares tips that helped him become a major champion, specializing on and around the green. Jimmy discusses the keys to greenside bunker play, teaches how to chip it close with the wedge, and reveals how an alignment rod helps sink putts.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Jimmy Walker talks all aspects of distance, bringing out the driver to show how to gain distance off the tee and how to tone it down.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Gary Koch reveals what the best ball strikers have in common. From TPC Tampa Bay in Florida.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and GOLF on NBC analyst Gary Koch reveals how he pitches to different distances and how things change when hitting from the rough. Plus, Koch demonstrates the technical and mental sides of putting.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Gary Koch shares tips on how he has adapted his swing as he has aged and his viewpoints on flexibility and distance.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Discover the strategies and techniques that work for them on the big stage and see what you can bring back to your own home course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Celine goes in depth on how she determines targets and shot shapes both off the tee and into the green.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Celine goes in depth on her Par 5 strategy to optimize her chances for scoring.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Jim "Bones" Mackay travels to Las Vegas to meet up with LPGA Tour winner Jenny Shin on the course for Part 1 of a 2-part series. Jenny shares her tips and strategies that have led to her LPGA career of over a decade.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: LPGA Tour winner Jenny Shin joins Bones on the course to share her tips and strategies that have led to her success at the highest level; Jenny explains how she’d play an approach shot differently.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.sub-title: Jake Knapp -- Trouble Shots & Par 5 Management
programme.desc: Jake Knapp analyzes par five shot management, covering tee shot techniques (lower trajectory, subtle fade), green slopes and putting speed.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Strategies for handling par fours, prioritizing smart decisions over power; evaluate the risk and reward of each shot, and learn specific techniques for tee shots and approaches.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf vs. Pole Vaulting -- Mando Duplantis

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer

programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Soldiers of Fortune
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Christian Slater) must protect a group of thrill-seeking millionaires who have paid big bucks to take part in a military excursion.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: A Dungeon Siege Tale
programme.desc: As war looms in an idyllic kingdom, a man (Jason Statham) sets out to rescue his kidnapped wife (Claire Forlani) and avenge their murdered son.

programme.title: In the Name of the King 2: Two Worlds
programme.desc: A former special forces soldier is sent back to medieval times to fulfill a prophecy.

programme.title: In the Name of the King 3: The Last Mission
programme.desc: Transported back to medieval times, a contract killer (Dominic Purcell) encounters a fierce army and a fire-breathing dragon.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: A monstrous storm devastates Los Angeles, leaving the streets flooded and infested with sharks.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Empire of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, most of Earth is covered by water and the only land is controlled by a warlord and his army of sharks. Humans are kept as food for the sharks until two friends risk their lives to rise against their captor and his legion of sharks.

programme.title: SnakeEater
programme.desc: Thugs kill the parents and kidnap the sister of a former search-and-destroy commando (Lorenzo Lamas).

programme.title: SnakeEater II: The Drug Buster
programme.desc: An ex-commando urban policeman (Lorenzo Lamas) must escape from a mental hospital to fight drug dealers.

programme.title: SnakeEater III... His Law
programme.desc: An ex-commando policeman (Lorenzo Lamas) with a sawed-off shotgun pumps belts of ammo at outlaw bikers.

programme.title: Soldiers of Fortune
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Christian Slater) must protect a group of thrill-seeking millionaires who have paid big bucks to take part in a military excursion.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: A death-row inmate from a Central American jail is among the prisoners taken to a remote island for a to-the-death match broadcast live over the Internet.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: A former bounty hunter (Randy Orton) lands in a tournament where convicts fight to the death for an online audience.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon is a seasoned hit man who is known for making his target's death look like an accident. When Fallon's girlfriend turns up dead, he goes after his old colleagues to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend, and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Duchess
programme.desc: Duchess, a small-time crook, tries to enter the treacherous underworld of diamond trafficking and ends up left for dead when a deal goes wrong. Determined to seek retribution she launches into an unwavering pursuit for vengeance.

programme.title: Black Christmas
programme.desc: An unknown caller first harasses then murders a group of sorority sisters (Katie Cassidy, Mary Elizabeth Winstead, Lacey Chabert) during a holiday break.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A fallen swordsman (Clive Owen) leads a small army against a sadistic ruler to avenge his dishonored master (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: The King of Fighters
programme.desc: Members of three legendary clans fight battles in other dimensions.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon is a seasoned hit man who is known for making his target's death look like an accident. When Fallon's girlfriend turns up dead, he goes after his old colleagues to find the one responsible.

programme.title: The Delta Force

programme.desc: Terrorists reroute a passenger jet from Athens to Beirut, where commandos (Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin) are waiting to negotiate.

programme.title: Cyborg 2: Glass Shadow
programme.desc: In 2074 a video image (Jack Palance) and a man (Elias Koteas) must save a cyborg (Angelina Jolie) before it self-detonates in an electronics company.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two brothers (Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus), believing themselves to be on a mission from God, begin killing members of Boston's underworld.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: Frank Castle, known as the Punisher, ruthlessly demolishes organized crime, but it starts an even bigger war.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: Outcast
programme.desc: A fugitive Chinese prince and his sister enlist the aid of two war-weary Crusaders (Nicolas Cage, Hayden Christensen) to help them defeat their older brother, who murdered their father and seized the throne.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: Global warming has melted Earth's glacial mass, submerging nearly the entire planet in water. Sharks now dominate the planet as one massive school is led by a mutant alpha.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Green Street Hooligans: Underground
programme.desc: After his brother dies in an organized fight, a one-time hooligan who has become a martial artist returns to avenge the young man.

programme.title: Missing in Action
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) escapes from the Viet Cong, then comes back with a floating arsenal to get others out.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: An imprisoned U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) fights the military overlord (Oh Soon-tek) of a slave-labor opium operation in Vietnam.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) returns to Vietnam and fights his way out with his wife, son (Roland Harrah III) and Amerasian orphans.

programme.title: Contract Killer
programme.desc: A fast talker (Eric Tsang) engages a Hong Kong rube (Jet Li) to track down the assassin of a sleazy Japanese businessman.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.title: The Vatican Tapes

programme.desc: After his brother dies in an organized fight, a one-time hooligan who has become a martial artist returns to avenge the young man.

programme.title: The Director's Chair
programme.desc: Director Guillermo Del Toro discusses his career from artist to director/producer and his films.

programme.title: The Bill Collector
programme.desc: When a man's debt suddenly comes due, he has less than three weeks to pay back the money.

programme.title: Kickboxer 5: The Redemption
programme.desc: An American kickboxer heads to South Africa to find the promoter responsible for the deaths of two friends.

programme.title: Bent
programme.desc: A discredited former cop connects a murder case to an elaborate conspiracy involving high-stakes treason.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two brothers (Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus), believing themselves to be on a mission from God, begin killing members of Boston's underworld.

Officer Mike Chandler and a young civilian passenger find themselves unprepared and outgunned when fate puts them squarely in-the-crosshairs of a daring bank heist that is being carried out by a fearless team of highly trained and heavily armed men.

Officer Mike Chandler and a young civilian passenger find themselves unprepared and outgunned when fate puts them squarely in-the-crosshairs of a daring bank heist that is being carried out by a fearless team of highly trained and heavily armed men.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2: Legend of the Grandmaster
programme.desc: Wing Chun martial arts master Ip Man moves to Hong Kong to create a school where he can teach his fighting techniques to a new generation. Instead, he's drawn into a showdown with a merciless boxer known as the Twister.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Martial-arts master Ip Man takes on a crooked developer and his gang of brutal thugs.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: The Director's Chair
programme.desc: Robert Rodriguez interviews John Carpenter about his career as a horror filmmaker.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and Richie's organization is infiltrated by an enemy fixated on destroying the Geckos, the Lords and all culebras.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Seth and Richie seek help from Santanico; Freddie and Ximena have an encounter with Brasa.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Freddie Gonzalez teams up with an old enemy; Seth and Richie track down an ancient hunter.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete
programme.desc: Police partners descend into the criminal underworld after they are suspended for assaulting a suspect on video.

programme.title: Route 666
programme.desc: Two federal agents (Lou Diamond Phillips, Lori Petty) encounter zombies on a desert highway years after the massacre of a chain gang.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Terrorists reroute a passenger jet from Athens to Beirut, where commandos (Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin) are waiting to negotiate.
